name: Basil Griffin Park
description: Basil Griffin Park is a place to play pickleball in Bowling Green, KY. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: Bowling Green Pickleball Club
description: Bowling Green Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bowling Green, KY. There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms. Reservations are available.

name: Diamond Pickleball
description: Courtside Lounge, 1,300 sqft pickleball pro-shop, event rental space. Full schedule of programs and private and semi-private coaching.
open_play_schedule: Extended hours for Diamond Members, including Sunday.

name: Ephram White Park
description: Ephram White Park is a place to play pickleball in Bowling Green, KY. There are 10 wood courts. 2 are outdoors and 8 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, lights, and water.

name: First Baptist Church Gym
description: First Baptist Church Gym is a place to play pickleball in Bowling Green, KY. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: F.O. Moxley Community Center
description: F.O. Moxley Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Bowling Green, KY. The court surface is wood. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Michael O Buchanon Park
description: Michael O Buchanon Park is a place to play pickleball in Bowling Green, KY. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.
